name: JESmon GX

signature_move.name: Seiken Meppa
signature_move.description: Unleashes asubluminalcombo-attack that succeedsGankoomon's secret technique

description: The final form of JESmon that awakened to its true power by undergoing harsh training with Gankoomon , and fully mastering it. Its form, in which its whole body is brimming with fighting spirit and sense of justice, is clad in the red color of blazing flames. The " Unlimitive Gauntlet ", which is now its main weapon, is a piece of equipment used for both offense and defense that switches between its respective Sword, Knuckle, and Shield Modes depending on the situation. The Tactical Arms has turned into a wing-shaped energy construct by evolving further, and its flight capability has also increased rapidly. In its Arms state, it unleashes a subluminal combo-attack that succeeds Gankoomon's secret technique ( Seiken Meppa ). Its final secret technique is JESmon GX itself becoming the vessel for its " Knights' Intruder ", the fourteenth Ultimate-Battle-Blade that should not exist, by concentrating the energy of the Royal Knights , turning into an offensive judgment sword that instantly erases the opponent no matter how strong they are.
